faq.subheading: Still need help? We’re here for you.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.question: Why does my business need a website?
faqs.answer: A website makes your business easier to find online, adds credibility, and helps attract more customers.

faqs.question: What is the average turnaround time?
faqs.answer: Basic websites are delivered in up to five business days, Professional websites in up to ten, and custom projects in up to twenty.

faqs.question: Will my site work on phones and tablets?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our websites adjust automatically to look great on desktops, tablets, and smartphones.

faqs.question: Can I host the site with another provider?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide all necessary files for you to host elsewhere. You won’t be charged for hosting or support in that case, but our support only applies to sites hosted with us.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept credit and debit cards and PayPal (worldwide), as well as Pix, bank transfer, and bank slip (Brazil only).

faqs.question: How do I request a quote?
faqs.answer: You can click any “Choose Plan” or “Request a Quote” button, or simply tap the floating WhatsApp icon to chat with us directly.

faqs.question: What types of sites do you build?
faqs.answer: We create blogs, landing pages, online stores, and specialized websites for areas such as healthcare, legal, veterinary, food service, and others.

faqs.question: What do I need to provide?
faqs.answer: At a minimum, we’ll need your business name, contact details, and logo. If you have any text, images, or videos you'd like to include, you're welcome to send those as well.

faqs.question: Will my site appear on Google?
faqs.answer: Yes. We set up every site so it can appear on search engines like Google, Bing, and Yahoo.

faqs.question: What are the monthly costs after delivery?
faqs.answer: If you choose to host with us, we offer hosting and support for 5.90 USD per month or 56 USD per year (a 20% discount). There are no monthly fees if you don’t host the site with us.

faqs.question: Is my data and investment secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use a digital contract to clearly outline responsibilities, deadlines, ownership, and guarantees—protecting both sides.

faqs.question: Can I update the site myself later?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our packages include a simple control panel so you can easily update text, images, and other content on your own.
